No Poverty.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description or objectives directly relates to eradicating poverty.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description or objectives directly relates to ending hunger or improving food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description or objectives directly relates to health, well-being, or related services.

Quality Education.reason: The course explicitly supports quality tertiary education through overseas experiences, subsidies (Target 4.b), skill development (Target 4.4), and cross-cultural communication fostering global citizenship (Target 4.7).

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description or objectives directly relates to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description or objectives directly relates to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description or objectives directly relates to energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course directly facilitates 'internships with an overseas company' and 'field work,' preparing students for 'productive employment' and 'decent job creation' (Targets 8.3, 8.5).
evidence: plan an overseas trip for work and/or academics

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course is for 'Global Communication and Innovation Technology' students and lists 'Innovation' as a core competence, directly supporting Target 9.5 on enhancing innovation.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course promotes 'Cross-Cultural Communication' and understanding 'another cultural context,' which can foster social inclusion (Target 10.2) and facilitate responsible mobility (Target 10.7).

discuss how media companies work in another cultural context

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description or objectives directly relates to sustainable cities or communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description or objectives directly relates to responsible consumption or production.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description or objectives directly relates to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description or objectives directly relates to marine life or oceans.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description or objectives directly relates to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The emphasis on 'Cross-Cultural Communication' can indirectly contribute to global understanding, which is a foundation for non-discriminatory policies (Target 16.b).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course is fundamentally built on international cooperation through 'study exchange abroad' and 'internships,' fostering knowledge sharing and multi-stakeholder partnerships (Targets 17.6, 17.16).
